common_execution.decision: At the close of the final completed observation bar.
common_execution.entry: Open of the next preregistered contiguous one-minute bar in the same explicit contract and segment.
common_execution.overlap: At most one open trade per candidate; later signals are skipped until exit.
common_execution.roll: Observation, entry and exit must remain in one explicit contract and contiguous segment.
common_execution.costs: Product and horizon-specific V7 round-turn cost model at multipliers 1.0, 1.5 and 2.0.
common_execution.session_flatten: No position remains open at or after 15:10 CT; overnight positions open only after 17:00 CT and close before the following cash session.

hypotheses.economic_hypothesis: Equity-index holders require intermediaries to warehouse macro and geopolitical risk while cash markets are closed, so the long side earns a positive overnight inventory premium net of execution costs.
hypotheses.who_pays: Participants demanding overnight downside insurance and intermediaries transferring unhedged cash-market inventory.
hypotheses.activation: Every eligible Monday-through-Thursday Globex session with a contiguous explicit contract; Sunday evening is excluded to avoid weekend-gap mixing.
hypotheses.exit_CT: 08:29 on the next Chicago trading day

hypotheses.economic_hypothesis: An overnight displacement larger than its past-only median embeds thin-liquidity inventory that cash-session liquidity providers partially unwind during the first ninety minutes.
hypotheses.who_pays: Urgent overnight hedgers crossing thinner liquidity before the cash-session participant base arrives.
hypotheses.observation_window_CT: 17:00 previous session inclusive to 08:29 current trading day inclusive

features.activation_threshold: median absolute overnight displacement over the immediately preceding 20 eligible sessions only

hypotheses.activation: Absolute overnight displacement is at least the frozen past-only median.

hypotheses.economic_hypothesis: Urgent morning orders temporarily displace price; once their participation decays before lunch, replenished passive liquidity earns compensation by reverting the efficient morning displacement.
hypotheses.who_pays: Morning liquidity takers that complete urgent execution before midday depth replenishes.

features.path_efficiency: absolute displacement divided by signed path length
features.activation_threshold: median absolute morning displacement over the immediately preceding 20 eligible sessions only

hypotheses.activation: Absolute morning displacement is at least the past-only median and path efficiency is at least 0.35.

hypotheses.economic_hypothesis: A directional morning parent order that survives a low-range midday pause resumes when afternoon liquidity returns because the underlying inventory transfer remains unfinished.
hypotheses.who_pays: Large parent orders split across session phases and counterparties delaying execution until afternoon liquidity returns.

features.morning_threshold: median absolute morning displacement over the immediately preceding 20 eligible sessions only
features.compression_threshold: median midday high-low range over the immediately preceding 20 eligible sessions only
features.retention: midday close retains at least 50 percent of the signed morning displacement from the 08:30 open

hypotheses.activation: Morning displacement exceeds its past median, midday range is no greater than its past median, and at least half the signed morning move is retained.

hypotheses.economic_hypothesis: The scheduled US petroleum inventory release forces physical hedgers and discretionary traders to adjust CL exposure over several minutes, so a high-efficiency initial shock continues while those inventory transfers complete.
hypotheses.who_pays: Physical-market hedgers and discretionary participants reacting sequentially to inventory information.
hypotheses.eligible_days: Wednesday Chicago trading days only; no holiday rescheduling inference is allowed.

features.path_efficiency: absolute displacement divided by signed path length
features.activation_threshold: median absolute shock displacement over the immediately preceding 12 eligible Wednesdays only

hypotheses.activation: Absolute shock displacement is at least the past-only Wednesday median and efficiency is at least 0.50.

stage3.folds: four contiguous numpy.array_split blocks of Chicago trading days
stage3.purge: exact maximum holding horizon at every boundary

permanent_tripwire.scope: Exact deterministic rerun of the frozen Phase 1 full account pipeline because grammar 0002 changes neither the simulator nor its OHLC source data.

selection.graveyard_feedback_level: mechanism_class x regime x death_cause only

CONTRE: The hypotheses are economically stated but several remain exposed to generic intraday seasonality, the fixed Wednesday CL clock ignores holiday rescheduling, and one-contract research paths may be too slow for a diagnostic Combine pass even when expectancy is positive; promotion therefore depends on DSR/BH and fresh proof, not pass-rate.
